name: Real-Time Strategy (RTS)
description: Build bases, manage resources, and command armies in tactical warfare

mechanics.coreLoop: Gather resources → Build structures → Train units → Scout enemy → Attack/Defend → Expand territory
playerActions: Train military units (infantry, vehicles, air units)
Scout enemy positions with reconnaissance units
Form army groups and issue attack commands
Capture strategic points on the map

mechanics: Technology tree with 3 tiers (early, mid, late game)
Resource income scales with map control
Commander abilities unlock over match time

failConditions: Run out of resources and units
Timeout with fewer points than opponent

resourceSystems.name: Minerals/Credits
resourceSystems.mechanics: Primary currency mined from resource nodes, used for all construction

resourceSystems.name: Gas/Energy
resourceSystems.mechanics: Advanced resource for high-tech units, requires special collectors

resourceSystems.name: Population Cap
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limits total unit count, increased by building supply depots

resourceSystems.name: Power Grid
resourceSystems.mechanics: Buildings require power, generated by reactors or solar panels

setting.era: Sci-fi future (2200+) or historical war period
setting.location: Alien planets, space stations, or historical battlefields

protagonist.background: Military commander tasked with leading faction to victory
protagonist.motivation: Secure resources and territory for their civilization's survival

conflict.primary: Three factions competing for control of limited habitable worlds
secondary: Ancient alien technology discovery sparks arms race
Mysterious alien threat unites old enemies

worldRules.physics: Futuristic physics allowing faster-than-light travel and energy weapons. Realistic unit movement and terrain effects.
worldRules.technology: Hover vehicles, orbital strikes, shield generators, teleportation gates, AI-controlled drones

difficulty: High complexity with steep learning curve
targetAudience: Players who enjoy planning, multitasking, and strategic depth
